Class AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy

java.lang.Object
shelter.strategy.AbstractMatchingStrategy
shelter.strategy.AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMatchingStrategy
Direct Known Subclasses:
BreedPreferenceStrategy, SpeciesPreferenceStrategy
public abstract class AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy extends AbstractMatchingStrategy
Base class for binary match strategies that return either a full match or no match.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy()
    Constructs a new abstract binary matching strategy.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected abstract boolean
    isMatch(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
    Returns whether the adopter-animal pair is a binary match under this criterion.
    double
    score(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
    Returns 1.0 for a binary match and 0.0 otherwise.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy

      protected AbstractBinaryMatchingStrategy()
      Constructs a new abstract binary matching strategy. Subclasses invoke this constructor implicitly when they are instantiated.

  • Method Details

    • score

      public double score(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
      Returns 1.0 for a binary match and 0.0 otherwise.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter being evaluated
      animal - the animal being evaluated
      Returns:
      1.0 when the binary condition matches; 0.0 otherwise

    • isMatch

      protected abstract boolean isMatch(Adopter adopter, Animal animal)
      Returns whether the adopter-animal pair is a binary match under this criterion.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter being evaluated
      animal - the animal being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the pair matches under this criterion
